prompt:
Research the strongest current official statewide AI-in-education policy sources for Delaware (DE).

Context:
- Current approval route: human_review
- Review status: approved
- Confidence: 1
- Routing reasons: manual_review_completed
- Deep research reasons: none

Current known sources:
- Generative AI in Delaware Education – Delaware Department of Education | https://education.delaware.gov/educators/academic-support/standards-and-instruction/digital-de/instructional-resources/ai-in-delaware-education/generative-ai/
- Discovered from official_guidance | https://education.delaware.gov/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/GenAI_ISP-AUP-CodeConduct_Guidance.pdf
- Discovered from official_guidance | https://education.delaware.gov/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/delaware_generative_ai_DE_guidance.pdf
- Classroom Management for Generative AI – Delaware Department of Education | https://education.delaware.gov/educators/academic-support/standards-and-instruction/digital-de/instructional-resources/ai-in-delaware-education/classroom-management-for-generative-ai/
- Implementing AI for Districts and Charter Schools – Delaware Department of Education | https://education.delaware.gov/educators/academic-support/standards-and-instruction/digital-de/instructional-resources/ai-in-delaware-education/generative-ai/implementing-ai/
- Integrating AI in the Classroom – Delaware Department of Education | https://education.delaware.gov/educators/academic-support/standards-and-instruction/digital-de/instructional-resources/ai-in-delaware-education/generative-ai/integrating-ai/
- AI in Delaware Education – Delaware Department of Education | https://education.delaware.gov/educators/academic-support/standards-and-instruction/digital-de/instructional-resources/ai-in-delaware-education/

Requirements:
- Prioritize official statewide sources such as department of education pages, state board guidance, formal frameworks, model policies, statutes, or regulations.
- Identify whether the current record is missing a stronger primary source.
- Flag conflicts between press releases and primary documents.
- Provide field-level evidence relevant to AI use, assessment, privacy, teacher professional development, and implementation stage.
- Recommend one of: auto_approve, sample_audit, human_review.
- Return a concise evidence memo with direct source links and unresolved questions.
